## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Matthew Panzarino (CCO at growthx.ai) and s.a. Gayatri for a Content Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gayatri has extensive experience writing content across 25+ industries, specializing in tech, marketing, travel, healthcare, and gaming](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses a combination of Airtable, AirOps, and custom tooling for content workflows, with plans to launch their own platform](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [The role involves working remotely, using Slack/Notion for communication, and collaborating closely with Managing Editors on client projects](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [Located in Hyderabad, India](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Extensive content writing experience across various industries (25+)](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Managed content teams (both small and large, up to 45-50 people)](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Written diverse content types: blogs, articles, social media, white papers, YouTube scripts, ad copy](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Recent experience in IoT and SaaS company](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Proficient with AI writing tools (Jasper, Pepper Content, Copy.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Company Overview (growthx.ai)

  - [Matthew: Chief Content Officer, previously Editor-in-Chief at TechCrunch for 10 years](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Fully remote team with engineering capabilities (not just an agency)](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Varied client base: healthcare, security, travel, AI-driven marketing](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Custom tooling: Airtable + AirOps for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Plans to launch their own complete internal tooling platform](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Role Description

  - [Content Manager responsible for 2-5 clients](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Day-to-day: Slack/Notion communication, keyword research, content creation using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Collaborate with Managing Editors (client-facing roles)](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Opportunity to present work directly to clients occasionally](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Focus on producing high-quality content efficiently using provided tools](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

### Company Culture and Growth

  - [Emphasis on feedback loop between content team and engineering](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Rapidly growing team, hiring quickly](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Strong async processes with recorded client calls and comprehensive documentation](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to provide feedback on Gayatri's candidacy](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Potential follow-up communication regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/tzj2yvErKRgmr1gqkyGDPwo7Yun_V3dC?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
